title: The need for business finance
summary: 9609 AS — start-up, expansion, and working capital finance needs.
learningObjectives: Distinguish capital expenditure and revenue spending.
Identify finance needs at life-cycle stages.

simpleExplanation.title: Money to start and grow
simpleExplanation.summary: Firms need funds for initial setup, day-to-day operations, and investment in growth or new assets.

sections.content: **Need for finance** (5.1.1) opens **Topic 5**. Match **finance type** to **business situation** in cases.

sections.label: Mark a business finance need question
